<!-- Thanks for contributing! / ¡Gracias por contribuir! -->

## What & why / Qué y por qué

<!-- Describe the change and the motivation. / Describe el cambio y la motivación. -->

## Type / Tipo

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ Feature
- [ ] 📖 Docs
- [ ] 🎮 New game (data/games.json)
- [ ] 🧹 Chore / refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] I did **not** commit any game data / ISOs / disk images / BIOS
- [ ] `make all` passes locally (lint + check + test)
- [ ] I updated **both** launchers (`pcf` and `pcf.ps1`) if behaviour changed
- [ ] I updated the docs (`README.md`, `docs/en.md`, `docs/es.md`) if needed
